title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.12 — AGED LIT-LENS: complete backlit-tile recipe change. The tiles are now vintage aerospace push-button indicators (Apollo-era MOCR / Korry): a lamp behind a yellowed frosted diffuser — the WHOLE lens face glows; legend flips to dark silkscreen ink (EB::inkText, glowText removed); lit mapping is physical (0.72 idle = lamp on, 0.92 hover, 1.0 pressed, 0.15 disabled = dead lens); aged character = off-centre lamp, tired-reflector corner, tea-stain yellowing, corner grime, worn sheen; face cached per (size, accent, lit) so richer layering stays one blit per repaint. Paint-only (no DSP, no layout). VERIFY IN ABLETON: every tile reads as a LIT LENS (face luminous, not dark-cap-plus-glow); dark legend crisp on the lit face; disabled tiles read as dead unpowered indicators; still zero blue in the lamp (COMPRESS aqua only in strip+rail). Design source: creosote_backlit_lens_variants.html V4. Remaining UI punch-list unchanged: GRIT deep controls -> TWEAK, AMBER vertical stage-tags, top-down GR meter, raise bottom section.
